summary: Iteration 272 — Admin purge of Zoho-imported accounting data. Backend in-process tests on routes.accounting_transactions.purge_imported_transactions verified happy path (deleted_transactions=3, sync_jobs/sync_state/counter all cleared for synthetic tenant), wrong confirmation -> 400, empty confirmation -> 400, non-admin role -> 403. Frontend purge dialog double-confirm verified on /accounting/transactions: confirm button disabled initially, disabled for 'delete'/'xx', ENABLED only on exact 'DELETE'; Cancel closed the dialog (confirm was NEVER clicked, so no real data was touched).
critical_code_review_comments: purge_imported_transactions correctly scopes deletes by tenant_id on all 4 stores (transactions, sync_jobs, sync_state, counters) — safe from cross-tenant deletion.
Confirmation check uses .strip() so leading/trailing whitespace around 'DELETE' is tolerated server-side, while the frontend uses purgeText.trim()==='DELETE' to gate the button — consistent.
Frontend dialog passes confirmation='DELETE' verbatim; the disabled-gate makes accidental purges very unlikely.
Minor: file /app/frontend/src/pages/AccountingTransactions.js is >1200 lines — consider extracting ExpandedEditor/CategoryCascader into separate files for maintainability.
Minor: route registered at /accounting/transactions (not /accounting). The request brief said /accounting; verify if a redirect/alias is desired.
seed_data_creation: Synthetic tenant test-purge-iter272-<rand>: 3 accounting_transactions, 1 sync_job, 1 sync_state, 1 counters doc. Cleaned up via autouse fixture before/after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend purge uses in-process pattern (monkeypatch at_mod.get_current_tenant_id). Frontend dialog data-testids: purge-accounting-btn, purge-dialog, purge-confirm-input, purge-confirm-btn, purge-cancel-btn. Real route is /accounting/transactions. NEVER click purge-confirm-btn on the real nyla tenant.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verification, no bug found.
